title: Remediate Exposed Secrets in Blade Templates
description:
Snyk code scan detected secrets exposed in Blade template files. The following files were flagged:

- `resources/views/pages/metrics.blade.php`
- `resources/views/pages/metric_single.blade.php`
- `.vapor/build/app/resources/views/pages/metrics.blade.php`
- `.vapor/build/app/resources/views/pages/metric_single.blade.php`

Secrets need to be moved to environment variables or a secure configuration store, and the Vapor build artifacts should be excluded from the repository.
acceptance_criteria: No secrets are hardcoded in Blade template files
Secrets are loaded from environment variables or secure configuration
Vapor build artifacts with secrets are excluded from version control
middleware_changes: Secrets moved from hardcoded Blade template values to environment variables or secure configuration.
implementation_notes: Vapor build directory (.vapor/build/) contains copies of the source files with the same exposed secrets. Both source and build artifacts need remediation.
